name: Butler Style Binding Arts
descs:
Turn Start: inflict 1 [Binding] against the enemy who recovered from Stagger last turn

On Hit from an ally with the highest HP percentage: if the target is Staggered, deal +7.5% damage for every Stagger Level.

Turn Start: inflict 2 [Binding] against the enemy who recovered from Stagger last turn

On Hit from an ally with the highest HP percentage: if the target is Staggered, deal +10% damage for every Stagger Level.

Turn Start: inflict 3 [Binding] against the enemy who recovered from Stagger last turn

On Hit from an ally with the highest HP percentage: if the target is Staggered, deal +12.5% damage for every Stagger Level.
